title: Femscout's Acid Trip...Part 2...The FLASHBACKS
description:
Femscout's Acid Trip...Part 2...The FLASHBACKS
========================================================
A detailed trip through the eyes of our lovely miss Femscout  where she is haunted by the hellish apparitions in her mind. Watch the journey of our protagonist as she 
undergoes a struggle within herself to survive the side effects of bonk! 


Just kidding its just an epic ear rape. Also another thing i'd like to point out is im progressing in SFM, i did the last segment and I hope for more better animations in the future. Btw plz support our struggling protagonist and drop a like [:
